name: KFC Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the chicken with a mixture of water and salt. Chill in a bowl for at least 1 hour.
2. Whisk together Fines herbs, onion powder, seasoned salt, instant chicken broth, and seasoned pepper in a blender.
3. Combine the wet herb mixture with the flour mixture until the chicken is well coated.
4. Melt enough shortening or salad oil in a large skillet to reach a depth of 1 inch. Heat to 375°F (190°C).
5. Fry the chicken pieces, turning once, for 5 minutes on each side.
6. Lift the chicken from the skillet and drain on paper towels.
7. When the chicken is fried, remove it from the skillet and drain the fat.
8. Add one cup of chicken broth to the skillet and return the chicken pieces. Cover and cook for 15 minutes or until fork-tender.
This recipe is entitled "Marie Walsh's Kentucky Fried Chicken". It was copied out of a magazine several years ago and has been used often. It comes as close to KFC as possible.
